sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Isometric Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses fixed-view isometric perspective for agent control and positioning within tactical combat scenarios

special_mechanics.name: Team-Based Unit Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls 1-4 cyborg agents simultaneously; agents follow player commands in isometric space

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Syndicate is a real-time tactics strategy game, not a character action platformer. No documented jump physics, gravity, or sub-pixel systems exist for this title. Movement is limited to tactical unit positioning within isometric space rather than continuous physics-based movement.
